name: io.github.cyanheads/exchange-rates-mcp-server
description: Convert currencies, get FX rates, and query historical ECB exchange rate data.

environmentVariables.name: FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Frankfurter API base URL. Override for local testing or self-hosted instances.

environmentVariables.name: FX_TIMESERIES_CANVAS_THRESHOLD_DAYS
environmentVariables.description: Day range above which fx_get_timeseries spills results to DataCanvas for SQL analytics.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: FRANKFURTER_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Frankfurter API base URL. Override for local testing or self-hosted instances.

environmentVariables.name: FX_TIMESERIES_CANVAS_THRESHOLD_DAYS
environmentVariables.description: Day range above which fx_get_timeseries spills results to DataCanvas for SQL analytics.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
